home.subtitle: Duniyar rubutu ta kyauta
home.emptyTagline: Farkon sararin ku babu komai. Zaɓi samfuri don farawa, ko fara daga komai.
home.tagline: Wuri mai tsabta don rubutu mai tsawo — labari, bincike, rubutu, mujallar yau da kullum.
home.syncOffChip: aiko/adana bayanan aiki ba a kunna ba · bayanan na iya ɓacewa
home.syncOnChip: aiko zuwa babban fayil an kunna
home.syncOnBody: Aikinku yana aiko zuwa fayil «{{folder}}» a wannan na'urar.
home.warningBody: Babu aiko bayanan. Komai yana cikin burauzar ku kuma share ɓoye-bayananta zai ɓata aikinku. Kuna iya kunna aiko zuwa fayil na gida a cikin Saitunan Duniya → Aiko.

about.title: game da
about.paragraph1: Wannan don marubuci wanda ke farawa daga sifili kullum. Wanda ke buɗe sabon takarda, ya rubuta jimloli uku (ko babu), sannan ya ɓata mintuna 40 yana gyara rubutun. Wanda mafi kyawun ra'ayoyinsa suna zuwa da dare a ƙarshen dare sai damuwa ta kama shi. Wanda ke da tabs goma sha huɗu, littattafai masu rubutu shida, da tashar da bai motsa ba tun wata.
about.paragraph2Before: Na san, saboda wannan ni ne
about.paragraph2After: . Ina da ADHD, Autism, mai yiwuwa akwai wasu cututtukan da ba a gano ba tukuna. Ina buƙatar wani abu da ya fahimci kwakwalwata mai hayaniya amma mai kayatarwa. Wuri don zubar da komai kafin ya ɓace (ko fara rubutu). Gutsutsuren ra'ayi, tunanin da ba a cika ba, dangantakar dare. Komai, a wuri ɗaya.
about.paragraph3: Don haka na gina wannan sarari don mu. Ina fata ya ba ku jin daɗin dopamine kamar yadda ya ba ni lokacin da na gina shi.
about.paragraph4Before: Ƙari ɗaya... Na yi imani da fasaha don alheri kuma ina ƙin talla. Don haka, wannan zai kasance mai 'yanci daga talla kuma na kyauta don amfani da ba na kasuwanci. Kuna iya yin canjin ku yadda kuka ga dama a ƙarƙashin
about.statusValueRest: — babu aiko bayanan. Duk bayanan an ajiye su a IndexedDB a cikin burauzar ku na gida. Idan kun share ɓoye-bayananta burauzar ku, aikinku zai ɓace.
about.feedbackBefore: Har yanzu ina gina wannan kuma ina da ra'ayoyi da yawa
about.feedbackAfter: . Ina son jin abin da ke aiki, abin da bai yi aiki ba, da abin da kuke fatan ya kasance. Maraba da ra'ayi.

language.title: Harshe
language.subtitle: Zaɓi harshen don fuska da labaran Help Center. Fassarorin da suka ɓace suna komawa Turanci.
language.label: Harshen fuska
language.hint: Canje-canje ana amfani da su nan take ana adana su a wannan burauzar.
language.machineTranslationNotice: Ana samar da fassarorin ban da Turanci ta atomatik. Yi hakuri saboda kowane kuskure — don Allah aika ra'ayi don mu gyara su.

editor.title: Mai gyara
editor.subtitle: Toolbar da kayan aiki na rubutu. Gajeren hanyar Markdown (#, >, -, **) suna ci gaba da aiki ba tare da la'akari da waɗannan saitunan ba.
editor.floatingToolbarHint: Yana bayyana akan haskakawa ko danna dama a yanayin rubutu.
editor.rightClickHint: Canja tsakanin toolbar mai iyo da menu na asali na burauzar.
editor.rightClickTooltip: Yi amfani da menu na asali akan danna dama maimakon toolbar mai iyo. Toolbar zai ci gaba da bayyana akan haskaka-zaɓi.
editor.inlineTogglesHint: Buttons na Bold da italic a cikin toolbar mai iyo.
editor.inlineTogglesTooltip: Ɓoye buttons B da I daga toolbar mai iyo. Gajeren hanyar Markdown (**, _) suna ci gaba da aiki.
editor.listDepthHint: Nawa zurfi zazzafai da lissafin da aka lissafta za su iya saukowa.
editor.listDepthTooltip: Ƙara ko rage iyakar zurfi na lissafi. Yanzu an gyara shi a matakai 2.
editor.templateDefaultsHint: Ƙayyadaddun ɗaukar hoton da ke bambanta kowane samfuri.
editor.templateDefaultsTooltip: Bari kowane samfuri (labari, mujallar yau da kullum, fasaha…) ya zaɓi nasa ɗaukar hoton.

docInspector.title: Mai duba takarda
docInspector.subtitle: Zaɓi waɗanne filayen ke bayyana a cikin mai duba takardu. Ana iya kashe kowannen su a duniya kuma a sauya ta sarari.
docInspector.statusHint: Nuna matsayin takarda da kulle takardu da aka kammala daga gyarawa.
docInspector.wordLimitHint: Nuna iyakar ƙidayar kalmomi da za ku iya saita kowane takarda.
docInspector.charLimitHint: Nuna iyakar ƙidayar harafi da za ku iya saita kowane takarda.
docInspector.dueDateHint: Nuna ranar ƙarshe da za ku iya saita kowane takarda.
docInspector.highlightLabel: Haskaka rubutu da ya wuce iyaka
docInspector.highlightHint: Alamar duk rubutu da ya wuce iyaka a cikin mai gyara.
docInspector.statusStagesHint: Zaɓi waɗanne matakai ke bayyana a cikin zaɓin matsayi.

accessibility.title: Samun dama
accessibility.subtitle: Daidaita fuska don jin daɗi da fasahar taimako. Kowace zaɓi tana farawa daga abin da ake yi yanzu — babu abin da zai canza har sai kun zaɓe shi.

theme.label: Jigo da bambancin launin
theme.hint: Jigogi masu bambancin launi mai ƙarfi suna cika ƙa'idar bambancin WCAG AAA.

motion.label: Motsi
motion.hint: Rage ko kashe animations na fuska.

lineSpacing.label: Tazarar layi
lineSpacing.hint: Ƙara sarari tsakanin layuka na rubutu.

linkUnderline.label: Koyaushe yi wa hanyoyin haɗi layi ƙasa
linkUnderline.hint: Nuna layukan ƙasa don hanyoyin haɗi ba su dogara ga launi kaɗai ba.

focus.label: Ƙarin mai nuna sanya hankali
focus.hint: Yi amfani da abin zane mai kauri da ƙarfi mafi girma akan sanya hankali.

reset.label: Dawo zuwa ƙayyadaddun
reset.hint: Dawo da motsi, girman rubutu, tazarar layi, hanyoyin haɗi, da sanya hankali zuwa ƙayyadaddun su. Jigunka bai canza ba.

general.title: Gaba ɗaya
general.subtitle: Yadda LIpsum Writer ke bayyana a ƙayyadaddun. Babu abin da ke lalata bayanan.
general.comingSoonBody: Yawan ɗaukar ɗimbin kaya, rage motsi, ganin alamomin maɓallin, da abin da ke buɗewa a farawa.
general.compactDensityHint: Layuka masu kuncin a cikin jerin, ɗaukar kaya na kuncin ko'ina.
general.reduceMotionHint: Tsallake animations na canjin tsakanin ra'ayoyi.
general.keyboardHintsHint: Nuna gajeren hanyar ⌘-key a cikin tooltips da kusurwa na buttons.
general.startupHint: Abin da kake gani yayin da ka kaddamar da app.

appearance.title: Bayyanar
appearance.subtitle: Launi, nau'in haruffa, yawan ɗaukar kaya. Yanayin da kake so wannan abin ya saita.
appearance.comingSoonBody: Tarin jigogi masu kyau, launi na ƙawa, da yawan ɗaukar kaya. Canjin jigo na yau yana a cikin saitunan sauri na karkace duniya.
appearance.themeHint: Tarukan jigogi uku masu kyau. Suna daidaita komai — launin tubalan, layukan gashi, ko da ƙira.
appearance.accentHint: Ana amfani da shi don hover, sanya hankali, zoben gyarawa mai aiki.

templates.title: Samfurori
templates.subtitle: Tsararrakin da za a iya sake amfani da su don sababbin sarari da takardu.
templates.comingSoonBody: Rubuta naku samfurori tare da sassa, sunayen takardu na ƙayyadaddun, da stubs na rubutu.

items.journalSub: Na yau da kullum · Na mako · Tunani

palettes.title: Launi don haskaka
palettes.subtitle: Tarukan slotoci biyar a kowane sarari — ba su suna kuma daidaita kowane launi.
palettes.comingSoonBody: Gyara, adana, kuma canza tarin launi na haskaka masu suna (Shaida, Don sake gyarawa, Ambato…) a duk sarari.

items.loose: Ƙarshen da ba a cika ba

citations.title: Salon ambato
citations.subtitle: Ƙayyadaddun salon ambato a duk sarari.
citations.comingSoonBody: Zaɓi salon duniya (Chicago, APA, MLA…) tare da canje-canje na sarari.
citations.styleHint: Ana amfani da shi yayin shigar da sabon ambato. Canje-canje na sarari za su zo daga baya.

annotation.title: Bayanan kula
annotation.subtitle: Bayanan kula na gefen shafi da na cikin rubutu.
annotation.comingSoonBody: Nau'ukan bayanan kula, ƙayyadaddun ganin su, da ɗabi'ar fitar.
annotation.showMarginLabel: Nuna bayanan kula na gefen shafi
annotation.showMarginHint: Bayanan kula suna iyo a gefen dama idan akwai sarari.
annotation.showInlineLabel: Nuna haskakan rubutu na cikin layi
annotation.showInlineHint: Launin bayanan kula yana zubo kan rubutu da ke ƙasa.
annotation.exportHint: Ana rubuta bayanan kula tare da jikin takardu.

export.title: Fitar / Shigar
export.subtitle: Motsa bayanan cikin da wajen LIpsum Writer.
export.comingSoonBody: Fitar tare da .zip, shigar daga wani kunshin LIpsum ko jakar Markdown.
export.formatHint: Fitar kowane-takarda da kowane-sarari suna amfani da ƙayyadaddun ɗaya.
export.importHint: Kawo wani kunshin LIpsum ko jakar fayilolin Markdown.
export.importSpaceHint: Kawo sarari cikin wannan burauzar daga taskar Writer (.zip) — zazzagewar snapshot ko fitar aiko-zuwa-fayil daga wata na'ura.
export.comingSoonHint: Fitar tare da kuma shigar daga jakunan Markdown ko vaults na Obsidian.
export.comingSoonTooltip: An tsara — ba a samu tukuna.

data.title: Bayananku
data.subtitle: Inda aikinku ke zaune da kuma nawa sarari take.
data.comingSoonBody: Amfani da IndexedDB, ƙiyasin ajiya, da share komai da danna ɗaya.
data.storageLabel: Ajiya da aka yi amfani da ita
data.wipeHint: Yana cire kowane sarari, takarda, da snapshot daga wannan burauzar. Babu dawo da shi.

about.title: Game da
about.subtitle: Bayanan ginin da hanyoyin haɗi.
about.comingSoonBody: Duba shafin /about don tarihi; wannan tab zai ɗauki bayanan ginin, lasisin, da canje-canje.

account.title: Asusun
account.subtitle: Shiga, aiko tsakanin na'urori, da wuraren aiki na gama-gari.
account.comingSoonBody: Aiko zuwa girgije ba a samu yau ba — Lotem na gida kawai. Asusun, shiga, da wuraren aiki na gama-gari za su zo lokacin da aiko ya zo.
account.signedOutHint: Aiko zuwa girgije ba a samu tukuna. Wannan yana nan don nuna ƙirar.
account.syncHint: Da zarar kun shiga, sararin ku zai kwafi zuwa sauran na'urori.

typography.title: Rubutun haruffa
typography.subtitle: Ƙayyadaddun a duk duniyoyi. Duniyoyin da ke su ɗaya na iya sauya.
typography.comingSoonBody: Zaɓi rubutun rubutu, rubutun UI, ƙayyadaddun girman karatu, tsayin layi, da ma'aunin duniyoyi sababbi.

shortcuts.title: Gajeren hanya
shortcuts.subtitle: Ɗaurawa na maɓallin don tafiya, tsari, da yanayi.
shortcuts.comingSoonBody: Gajeren hanyar da za a iya sake ɗaurawa don rubutu/karatu/rarrabuwa, yanayin mai da hankali, da toolbar na tsari.

backups.title: Adana bayanan
backups.subtitle: Fitar, dawo da, da kama hotuna na bayanan gida.
backups.comingSoonBody: Hotuna na gida masu jadawal, fitar ta hannu zuwa .zip, da dawo daga ajiyar da ta gabata.
backups.keepHint: Hotuna na tsufa suna fita ta atomatik.

sync.title: Aiko
sync.subtitle: Tura sararin ku zuwa fayil da kuka zaɓa. Nuna shi a fayil ɗin Google Drive, Dropbox, ko iCloud don aiko tsakanin na'urori.
sync.unsupportedTitle: Ba a samu a wannan burauzar ba
sync.unsupportedBody: Aiko zuwa fayil na buƙatar File System Access API, wanda ake samu a Chrome, Edge, da sauran burauzar Chromium a kwamfuta. Canza zuwa burauzar da ake tallafawa don amfani da shi.
sync.folderLabel: Fayil da aka haɗa don aiko
sync.folderHint: Kowane aiko yana rubuta Markdown .zip kowanne sarari a nan, yana kiyaye ƙarshe 5 tare da latest.zip. Aiko yana rabe daga Adana bayanan.
sync.intervalHint: Nawa sau sarari suna aiko ta atomatik yayin da app yana buɗe kuma fayil yana haɗe. Kowane sarari na iya canza wannan ƙayyadaddun.
sync.pushOnlyHint: Tura kawai a yanzu — wannan yana rubuta bayananku na gida zuwa fayil. Ja canje-canje ya dawo za su zo daga baya.
sync.reconnectHint: Aiko ya tsaya — burauzar na buƙatar izinin fayil sake don wannan zaman. Haɗa sake don ci gaba da aiko ta hannu da ta atomatik.

docInspector.title: Mai duba takarda
docInspector.subtitle: Sauya saitunan mai duba na duniya don wannan sarari.

palette.title: Launi don haskaka
palette.subtitle: Launi biyar masu suna waɗanda za a iya daidaita don wannan sarari.
palette.comingSoonBody: Sake suna, sake launi, da sake tsarawa slotocin haskaka wannan sarari.

items.loose: Ƙarshen da ba a cika ba

export.title: Fitar
export.subtitle: Motsa abun cikin wannan sarari zuwa wani kayan aiki.
export.comingSoonBody: Fitar zuwa Markdown .zip (yau ta Adana bayanan), LaTeX, HTML, ko PDF — komai a wuri ɗaya.
export.formatHint: Markdown yana fara farko; sauran za su biyo baya.

general.title: Gaba ɗaya
general.subtitle: Cikakkun bayanai masu bambantawa don wannan sarari. Canje-canje suna aiki nan take kuma suna aiko a duk ra'ayoyi.
general.nameHint: Ana nuna shi a cikin taken gefe da tooltip na tile na sarari.
general.tagHint: Lambar gajere (haruffa 2–4) da aka nuna a kan tile na sarari.

sharing.title: Rabawa
sharing.subtitle: Sarrafa yadda ake raba wannan sarari.
sharing.comingSoonBody: Ganin sarari da hanyoyin haɗi na raba. Za su zo lokacin da aiko zuwa girgije ya zo.
sharing.linkLabel: Hanyar haɗi da za a iya raba
sharing.linkHint: Karatu kawai a ƙayyadaddun. Izinin gyarawa yana bin Membobi.

template.title: Samfuri
template.subtitle: Samfurin tsari da aka ƙirƙiri wannan sarari da shi.
template.comingSoonBody: Canza samfurin sarari bayan ƙirƙira ba a tallafawa tukuna. Za ya zo da zarar za mu iya cire sassa da takardu lafiya.
template.changeHint: Yana sake tsara sassa da takardu masu wanzuwa zuwa sabon samfuri.

members.title: Membobi
members.subtitle: Mawallafa masu haɗin gwiwa da masu duba tare da damar shiga wannan sarari.
members.comingSoonBody: Gayyata masu haɗin gwiwa, sarrafa matsayi, da duba canje-canje. Za su zo tare da aiko zuwa girgije.
members.inviteHint: Za mu aiko musu hanyar haɗi don shiga wannan sarari.

backups.title: Adana bayanan
backups.subtitle: Kama hoton wannan sarari a matsayin .zip da za ku iya zazzage, kiyaye, da dawo daga gare shi.
backups.retentionHint: Ana kiyaye hotuna {{count}} mafi kwanan nan — tsofaffi ana cire su ta atomatik.
backups.empty: Babu hotuna tukuna — ƙirƙira ɗaya da + kama hoto yanzu.
backups.deleteConfirm: Share wannan hoto? Ba za a iya dawo da shi ba.
backups.restoreUnavailable: Wannan hoto ya riga ya fara tallafin dawo da — ana iya zazzage shi kawai.
backups.restoreDialogBody: Abun cikin wannan sarari na yanzu zai maye gurbin hoto. An fara ajiye hoton yanayin yanzu, don haka kana iya yin watsi da wannan dawo da.
backups.fileRestoreBody: Shiga ta Saitunan Duniya → Fitar / Shigar — yana dawo a matsayin sabon sarari, barin wannan ba tare da shafawa ba.

sync.title: Aiko
sync.subtitle: Tura wannan sarari zuwa fayil da aka haɗa, ta hannu ko akan jadawal. Aiko yana rabe daga Adana bayanan.
sync.folderHint: Haɗa fayil a Saitunan Duniya → Aiko. Ana amfani da fayil ɗaya don kowane sarari.
sync.intervalHint: Nawa sau wannan sarari yana aiko ta atomatik. Zaɓi Ƙayyadaddun don bi saitunan auto-aiko na duniya.

danger.title: Yankin haɗari
danger.subtitle: Ayyuka marasa juyawa. Karanta a hankali kafin ci gaba.
danger.deleteCardBody: Yana cire wannan sarari tare da kowanne takarda, sashi, bayanan kula na brain-space, bayanan kula, ambato, da haɗin gwiwa har abada. Ba za a iya dawo da shi ba.
danger.dialogBody: Wannan yana cire sarari da duk abun ciki har abada. Ba za a iya dawo da shi ba.

templates.syncTooltip: Aiko zuwa girgije ba a samu — wannan app na gida kawai a yanzu.

dump.headerCount: Brain space · {{count}} da ba a tsara ba
dump.title: Brain space
dump.mobileWarning: Brain space yana aiki mafi kyau a allon mafi girma.
dump.mobileNote: Canvas na buƙatar linzamin kwamfuta ko trackpad.

canvas.pendingHint: shift-danna wata bayanin kula don haɗawa · esc don soke

drawer.title: Cikakkun bayanai na bayanin kula
drawer.description: Gyara bayanin kula da aka zaɓa kuma sarrafa haɗin gwiwar sa.
drawer.pictureLimitHint: an kai iyakar {{count}} — cire ɗaya don ƙara wani.
drawer.connectionsEmpty: shift-danna wata bayanin kula a kan canvas don haɗawa.

split.title: Ra'ayin rarrabuwa
split.mobileWarning: Ra'ayin rarrabuwa yana buƙatar allon mafi girma.
split.mobileNote: Buɗe wannan takarda a yanayin Write maimakon.
split.pickDoc: Zaɓi takarda daga dropdown da ke sama.

citationsDrawer.title: Ambato
citationsDrawer.description: Nema, shigar, da fitar ambato don wannan sarari.

citations.title: Ambato
citations.noMatch: babu layuka da suka dace da binciken ku.
citations.importHint: shigar .bib ko ƙara ɗaya ta hannu.
citations.unknownError: kuskure da ba a sani ba

edit.duplicateKey: Tag «{{key}}» an riga an yi amfani da shi a wannan sarari.
edit.confirmDeleteUsed: Ana amfani da wannan ambato {{count}}× a cikin takardu. Share duk da haka?
edit.confirmDeleteSingle: Share ambato «{{key}}»? Ba za a iya dawo da shi ba.

bulk.setTypeAria: Saita noma don ambato da aka zaɓa
bulk.typeApplied: An saita noma zuwa {{type}} a kan ambato {{count}}.
bulk.confirmDelete: Share ambato {{count}}? Ba za a iya dawo da su ba.

row.selectAllAria: Zaɓi duk ambato a wannan shafi
